case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PERSONAL SERVICE ON INTERESTED PARTY MICHAEL LAUWERS FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FOR INTERROGATORIES HEARING SET FOR SEP-18-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FOR INTERROGATORIES IS CONTINUED FROM SEP-18-2014 TO OCT-01-2014, AT 9:00 AM, IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S (THE "PEOPLE") THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE PEOPLE MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 18, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT 3.1110(F). JUDGE PRO TEM: DOUGLAS ROBBINS; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1536 AND ORDER TO DEPOSIT MONEY

DISCOVERY, 302, MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FOR INTERROGATORIES IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. MOVING PARTY DID NOT DELIVER A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND THE COURT'S MINUTE ORDER DATED SEPTEMBER 18, 2014. JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-18-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-01-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council For Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council For Interrogatories is taken off calendar. Moving party did not deliver a courtesy copy of the moving papers in violation of SF Local Rule 2.6B and the Court's minute order dated September 18, 2014. Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council For Interrogatories
Off Calendar Sep-18-2014 Continued To Oct-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Raymond Fong, of Office of the District Attorney, Tel. 415.734.3120, for petitioners and moving party;
No other appearances.

RULING. Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council For Interrogatories is continued to October 1, 2014, to give the People of the State of California's (the "People") the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The People must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 18, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be DENIED. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per California Rules of Court 3.1110(f). Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
